channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [BRIGHOTEL] Brigade Hotel Ventures Ltd Closes Trading Window for Designated Persons
item.description:
Brigade Hotel Ventures Ltd has announced that the trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives will be closed from Wednesday, April 1, 2026, up to 48 hours after the declaration of financial results for the fourth quarter and year ending on March 31, 2026. This decision is in accordance with Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the Code of Internal Procedures and Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading in Securities of Brigade Hotel Ventures Limited. The date of the Board Meeting to consider and approve the financial results for the aforesaid period will be intimated in due course.

  • Brigade Hotel Ventures Ltd closes trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives
  • Closure effective from Wednesday, April 1, 2026, up to 48 hours after the declaration of financial results
  • Decision in accordance with Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Board Meeting date to consider and approve financial results will be intimated later
  • Part of the Code of Internal Procedures and Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading in Securities of Brigade Hotel Ventures Limited

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Brigade Hotel Ventures Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [KOTHARIPRO] Mitesh Kothari Acquires Shares of Kothari Products Ltd from Deepak and Arti Kothari
item.description:
Mitesh Kothari has acquired 200,000 shares of Deepak Kothari and 600,000 shares of Arti Kothari in Kothari Products Ltd. The acquisition was made by way of Inter-se-Transfer. The transaction was exempted from making an open offer under Reg.10 (1) (a) (ii) & 10 (1) (a) (i) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011. The disclosure was made within the prescribed time under the regulations on 28.03.2026. The price of the shares acquired was Rs. 64.17 per share. The acquisition increased Mitesh Kothari's shareholding from 2.04% to 6.13% of the diluted share capital of Kothari Products Ltd.

  • Mitesh Kothari acquires 200,000 shares of Deepak Kothari and 600,000 shares of Arti Kothari
  • The acquisition was made by way of Inter-se-Transfer
  • Exempted from making an open offer under Reg.10 (1) (a) (ii) & 10 (1) (a) (i) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011
  • Disclosure made within the prescribed time under the regulations on 28.03.2026
  • Mitesh Kothari's shareholding increased from 2.04% to 6.13% of the diluted share capital of Kothari Products Ltd

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KOTHARI PRODUCTS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [ARNOLD] Arnold Holdings Ltd Closes Trading Window Till 48 Hours After Audited Financial Results Announcement
item.description:
Arnold Holdings Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for all directors, officers, designated employees, and their immediate relatives. The closure will be in effect from 01st April, 2026 till 48 hours after the announcement of the Audited Financial Results of the company for the Quarter and year ended 31st March, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the consideration of the Audited Financial Results will be communicated later.

  • Arnold Holdings Ltd closes trading window for all directors, officers, designated employees, and their immediate relatives.
  • The closure will be in effect from 01st April, 2026 till 48 hours after the announcement of the Audited Financial Results for the Quarter and year ended 31st March, 2026.
  • The date of the Board Meeting for the consideration of the Audited Financial Results will be communicated later.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Arnold Holdings Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [VCU] VCU Data Management Ltd Closes Trading Window for Designated Persons Until After Q1 2026 Results
item.description:
VCU Data Management Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for all designated persons and their immediate relatives. The closure is in compliance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the company's code of conduct for prevention of insider trading. The trading window will remain closed from April 01, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of financial results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The date of the board meeting to consider and approve these results will be intimated separately.

  • VCU Data Management Ltd closes trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives
  • Closure is in compliance with SEBI regulations and company's code of conduct
  • Trading window to remain closed from April 01, 2026, until 48 hours after Q1 2026 results
  • Date of board meeting for approval of Q1 2026 results to be intimated separately

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VCU Data Management Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [NEXXUS] Nexxus Petro Industries Ltd Approves Sale of Land Parcel in Pali, Rajasthan for ₹1.72 Crore
item.description:
Nexxus Petro Industries Limited has approved the sale of a land parcel admeasuring 3.99 acres, owned by the Company, situated at Khasra No. 555/36, Village: Gajangadh, Kharda, Pali, Rajasthan. The land parcel is currently not operational and is not envisaged to be utilized in the present or foreseeable future. The sale is expected to be completed on 30th March, 2026, upon execution and registration of the Sale Deed with the office of the Sub-Registrar, in accordance with applicable laws. The consideration for the aforesaid sale / disposal is ₹1,71,71,000/- (Rupees One Crore Seventy- One Lakh Seventy-One Thousand only).

  • Nexxus Petro Industries Limited has approved the sale of a land parcel in Pali, Rajasthan.
  • The land parcel is currently not operational and is not envisaged to be utilized in the present or foreseeable future.
  • The sale is expected to be completed on 30th March, 2026.
  • The consideration for the sale is ₹1,71,71,000/- (Rupees One Crore Seventy- One Lakh Seventy-One Thousand only).
  • The sale does not constitute an undertaking or substantially the whole of the undertaking for the Company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nexxus Petro Industries Ltd | Category: Sale

item.title: [MAGENTA] Magenta Lifecare Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window for Directors, Promoters, and Insiders
item.description:
Magenta Lifecare Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for purchasing, selling, or dealing in the company's equity shares. The closure is applicable to all Directors, Promoters, Designated Persons, and Insiders of the company. The trading window will remain closed from Wednesday, 1st April, 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration and publication of Audited Financial Results for the Half Year and Year ended on 31st March, 2026.

  • Magenta Lifecare Ltd has closed the trading window for equity shares.
  • The closure is applicable to Directors, Promoters, Designated Persons, and Insiders.
  • The trading window will remain closed from 1st April, 2026.
  • The closure will last till 48 hours after the declaration and publication of Audited Financial Results for the Half Year and Year ended on 31st March, 2026.
  • This decision is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the company's Code of Practices, Procedure and Conduct.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Magenta Lifecare Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [TRANSFD] Transglobe Foods Ltd Holds Meeting of Independent Directors: Performance Review and Information Flow Assessment
item.description:
Transglobe Foods Ltd, in compliance with Section 149(7) of the Companies Act, 2013 and Regulation 25 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, held a separate meeting of the Independent Directors on March 30, 2026. The meeting, which started at 11 am (IST) and ended at 12.30 am (IST), discussed the review of the performance of Non-Independent Directors and the Board, the review of the performance of the Chairperson, and the assessment of the quality, quantity, and timeliness of the flow of information between the Company’s management and the Board.

  • Transglobe Foods Ltd held a meeting of Independent Directors to review the performance of Non-Independent Directors and the Board.
  • The performance of the Chairperson was also reviewed, taking into account the views of Executive and Non-Executive Directors.
  • The meeting assessed the quality, quantity, and timeliness of the flow of information between the Company’s management and the Board.
  • The meeting was held in compliance with Section 149(7) of the Companies Act, 2013 and Regulation 25 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
  • The meeting was held at the registered office of the Company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TRANSGLOBE FOODS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [INDOCO] Indoco Remedies Ltd Closes Trading Window Until 48 Hours After Q4 Results in 2026
item.description:
Indoco Remedies Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for dealing in Equity Shares from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and year ended 31st March 2026. The decision is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the company's code of conduct for regulating, monitoring, and reporting of trading by insiders. The date of the Board Meeting for the declaration of the financial results will be intimated later.

  • Indoco Remedies Ltd closes trading window from April 1, 2026
  • Trading window to remain closed until 48 hours after Q4 results in 2026
  • Decision in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Board Meeting date for financial results declaration to be announced later
  • Designated persons advised not to deal in Equity Shares during the closure of the trading window

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDOCO REMEDIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [TRANSFD] Transglobe Foods Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window till Completion of Financial Results for Quarter Ended 31st March, 2026
item.description:
Transglobe Foods Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window from 1st April, 2026 till the completion of 48 hours after the declaration of financial results for the quarter ended 31st March, 2026. This decision is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, SEBI(Prohibition of Insider Trading Amendment) Regulations,2018, and the company’s code of conduct of insider trading and fair disclosure. The closure is to regulate, monitor, and report trading by insiders. All designated persons, including Directors and designated employees, and their immediate relatives are notified not to enter into any transaction involving dealing/trading in shares of the company during this period.

  • Transglobe Foods Ltd announces closure of trading window from 1st April, 2026 till the completion of 48 hours after the declaration of financial results for the quarter ended 31st March, 2026.
  • The decision is in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, SEBI(Prohibition of Insider Trading Amendment) Regulations,2018, and the company’s code of conduct of insider trading and fair disclosure.
  • The closure is to regulate, monitor, and report trading by insiders.
  • All designated persons, including Directors and designated employees, and their immediate relatives are notified not to enter into any transaction involving dealing/trading in shares of the company during this period.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TRANSGLOBE FOODS LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [TRANSFD] Transglobe Foods Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window till Completion of 48 Hours After Q1 2026 Results
item.description:
Transglobe Foods Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the company's code of conduct. The closure will be from 1st April, 2026 till the completion of 48 hours after the declaration of financial results of the Company for the Quarter ended 31st March, 2026. This decision is to regulate, monitor and report trading by insiders. All designated persons, including Directors and designated employees, and their immediate relatives are not allowed to enter into any transaction involving dealing/trading in shares of the company during this period.

  • Transglobe Foods Ltd announces closure of trading window from 1st April, 2026 till 48 hours after Q1 2026 results
  • Closure in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and company's code of conduct
  • Designated persons, Directors, and designated employees, and their immediate relatives prohibited from trading during this period
  • Trading Window to reopen after 48 hours of Q1 2026 results declaration

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TRANSGLOBE FOODS LTD. | Category: Business Update
